title: Vanilla 3D
description: This pack provides 3D models for a large variety of blocks and entities in the game while still maintaining the vanilla style.
body: This pack provides 3D models for a large variety of blocks and entities in the game while still maintaining the vanilla style. Included in these blocks are most trapdoors and doors, most redstone components, most chiseled blocks, most workstation type blocks, and a good few natural blocks. Additionally, with Optifine CEM, improved models are also provided for horse saddles, chickens, parrots, golems, and skeletons.
